name: DeepSeek Web
description: Drive a logged-in DeepSeek web tab (send/wait/fetch) and optionally poll in background.

profile.description: Browser profile used by OpenClaw browser tool (for extension relay use chrome).

urlMatch.description: Substring used to locate the target chat tab URL.

openUrl.description: URL opened when no matching tab is found.

sendWaitMs.description: Default wait time after /deepseek ask before fetching latest content.

maxWindowMessages.description: Max messages kept from the latest page snapshot.

maxEventMessages.description: Max newly-captured messages retained in local plugin state.

inputSelector.description: CSS selector for chat input element.

messageSelector.description: CSS selector for generic message nodes.

userSelector.description: Optional CSS selector for user messages.

assistantSelector.description: Optional CSS selector for assistant messages.

profile.label: Browser profile
profile.help: Use chrome when controlling your existing logged-in browser tab via the extension relay.

openUrl.label: Open URL
openUrl.help: Opened automatically when no matching tab is found.
